## Meeting Purpose

[Coordinate logistics and content strategy for an upcoming executive breakfast event co-hosted by Koala and GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event space changed to a larger living room area, allowing for 16 attendees (mostly CMOs and prospects)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Koala will sponsor food/drinks; Bella (GrowthX) to handle ordering and setup](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Format: Marcel to open, brief intros/icebreaker, then demo AI-powered sales workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Theme: Overcoming inertia in growth strategies, showcasing AI's potential to accelerate change](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Topics

### Event Logistics

  - [New venue: Mid-century modern living room space with couches and a big screen](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Attendees: Up to 16 people, mostly CMOs and key prospects (e.g., Reddit, Plaid)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Food: Bella to order mini sandwiches, pastries, fruit bites, and coffee (budget \~$1500)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Setup: Bella will arrive early (7 AM) to arrange food and drinks](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Event Format

  - [Marcel to open and frame the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Brief introductions with a targeted question (60-second limit per person)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Potential for small group discussions if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Demo of AI-powered sales workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Emphasis on fostering connections and helpful discussions among attendees](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Theme: Overcoming inertia in growth strategies, embracing AI-driven change](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Showcase AI-powered workflow demos (e.g., prospect research, email generation)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Highlight success stories from innovative customers (without explicitly naming them)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Address common objections, particularly the resistance to changing established practices](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Frame "doing nothing" as the biggest risk to sustainable growth](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### AI Demo Preparation

  - [Marcel to adapt existing workflows (e.g., Ram's demo) for Koala](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Nick to share latest Koala deck and successful workflow examples](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Potentially incorporate Koala's intent signals into the demo (even if simulated)](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to send Koala's latest deck and example workflows to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Nick to provide Ramp card info and budget to Bella for food/drink ordering](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Marcel to refine the AI demo based on Koala's materials](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Team to further develop the overarching theme of overcoming growth inertia](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Marcel and Bella to have a separate call about office-related matters](https://fathom.video/share/ixgmryE7K97-pznYEDsNwRupbyrHAs5a?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
